info.name: OpacIT Mail
info.summary: Webmail with native Nextcloud SSO or plain password auth, full NC integration
info.author: NK-IT Dev
info.description:
**OpacIT Mail** — Webmail for Nextcloud with native SSO integration.
Log into Nextcloud via Keycloak or any OIDC provider, open Email — done. Your OIDC token authenticates directly against IMAP via OAuth2 (OAUTHBEARER/XOAUTH2). Deployments without OAuth SASL can use plain password authentication instead.
Everything runs through Nextcloud's native APIs — no external services, no separate databases.
### Native Nextcloud Integration - **Contacts** — read, create, edit contacts via NC Contacts API (all address books visible) - **Files** — attach files from NC Files, save emails/attachments to NC Files - **Calendar** — save ICS invitations to NC Calendar with duplicate detection - **Dashboard** — unread mail widget with automatic OIDC token refresh - **Search** — find emails via NC Unified Search - **SSO or password auth** — Keycloak, Authentik, any OIDC provider → IMAP without credentials, or classic PLAIN/LOGIN where needed
### Key Features - **Zero-config SSO** — OAUTHBEARER + XOAUTH2 auto-detected, token auto-refreshed - **Plain auth fallback** — manual login, stored credentials, and `occ x2mail:settings` - **Admin Panel via SSO** — NC admin = engine admin, no separate password - **Setup Wizard** — preflight checks for IMAP, SMTP, OIDC + JWT diagnostics - **NC33 native theme** — light + dark mode - **Sieve filtering** — server-side mail rules - **Multiple identities** — manage sender aliases - **OpenPGP / S/MIME** — end-to-end encryption - **CLI tools** — `occ x2mail:setup`, `occ x2mail:settings`, `occ x2mail:status`
### Setup ``` occ x2mail:setup --imap-host mail.example.com --domain example.com --sieve ```
### Requirements - Nextcloud 33+, PHP 8.3+ - IMAP server with OAUTHBEARER (Dovecot 2.4+) or PLAIN/LOGIN auth - OIDC provider (Keycloak, Authentik, etc.) + `user_oidc` for SSO mode
